title: Bash completions should list containers or images by default
body:
This patch will get bash completions to list a container or an image
when a user hits the <tab> button without a leading -.

Signed-off-by: Dan Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body: LGTM.  Two questions to possibly chase for later.  Should buildah run have a " __buildah_list_containers" near line 411?  Also buildah inspect can be used for containers or images, you've containers there which I think is right but thought I'd throw that by you to mull over.
Yes I thought about the inspect, I will fix that and run should have it also.
